function.name: search_google
function.description: Search Google and return a list of results, each with a title and link. Use this as your first step to find relevant pages. Returns an array of {title, link} objects.

query.description: Short search keywords, e.g. "Promptfoo LLM testing"

function.name: get_page_content
function.description: Fetch a URL and return its raw text. Use this after search_google to read a page. Returns {page_text, url, error}. The page_text is raw — you must summarize it yourself.

url.description: A URL from search_google results. Must start with http:// or https://.
